name: Roast Beef Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Roast beef, rare, thin slice
recipeInstructions:
50's Prime Time Cafe, Disney-MGM
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Divide the roast beef in half and place on a cookie sheet; top each portion of beef with a slice of cheese. Bake until the cheese melts and the beef is warm. Remove from the oven.
Assemble the sandwich as follows: Spread all 3 slices of bread with dressing. On one slice, add a portion of beef; top with lettuce and another slice of bread with dressing. Add another portion of beef, lettuce, bacon, and finally the third piece of toast with dressing. Secure with picks; cut in half. Serve with tomato, onion, and pickle.
